#+TITLE: Literate Org

A simple literate Agda module using the =.lagda.org= format.

#+begin_src agda2
module LiterateOrg where

data Nat : Set where
  zero : Nat
  suc  : Nat → Nat

add : Nat → Nat → Nat
add zero    m = m
add (suc n) m = suc (add n m)

-- Unsolved hole
test : Nat
test = {!!}
#+end_src
